case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHANTI RHODES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 953 CONNECTICUT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $5.77 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY FILED BY DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RHODES, SHANTI
